sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114685" key="xrhsteu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρηστεύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n114685.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be kind</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">merciful,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg007.perseus-grc1:13:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
